ItacAcademyItem.Name: Concili (Prima Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: the Academy was based in SS. Cosma e Damiano in Campo Vaccino. The Academy ceased to exist due to Garini`s departure. See Donato, Accademie romane (2000).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
